methodology.mpg_calculation: Vehicle-level period: (Max Odometer - Min Odometer) / Sum(All Gallons). Robust to partial fills.
methodology.split_fills: Consecutive fills with same odometer within 10 minutes are combined
methodology.odometer_validation: Missing or decreasing odometer readings flagged per transaction
methodology.flag_1_note: Flag 1 is a vehicle-level flag (not per-transaction). Vehicles whose period MPG is >20% below baseline are flagged.
